questions.question: Naive way to find max sum of k consecutive elements?
questions.explanation: For each window, sum k elements: O(n*k). Sliding window improves to O(n).

questions.question: In sliding window, update sum when window slides?
Complexity of sliding window for max sum of k elements?
questions.explanation: Slide across (n-k+1) positions, each O(1). Total: O(n).

questions.question: When use variable-size sliding window vs fixed-size?
questions.explanation: Dynamic windows grow/shrink based on conditions.

questions.question: Space complexity of basic sliding window approach?
questions.explanation: If only need result, update incrementally: O(1) extra space.
